summary: Dashboard displays properly with authenticated user layout, billing estimate, free plan usage cards, and empty indexes state. Contains some palette inconsistencies with manifesto requirements but maintains functional integrity.

violations.description: Dashboard background appears to be white/neutral rather than the required diner teal #9fd8d2 for public marketing surfaces. However, this may be acceptable as an authenticated user surface.
The authenticated dashboard chrome uses a different visual system from public marketing surfaces, which is expected per the rule about keeping them separated.

actions.description: Confirm whether authenticated dashboard surfaces should follow public marketing palette (M.palette.1) or maintain separate visual system per M.universal.4
Verify month selector functionality updates dashboard query month as specified
Confirm 'Create your first index' link properly navigates to /dashboard/onboarding
